title: tagetes zypaquirensis
intro: Tagetes zypaquirensis, also known as Mexican marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tagetes zypaquirensis include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Tagetes zypaquirensis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
